title: Telescope Array Focus Calibration (length-generalization)
strategies: trivial: predict the single most-frequent training state everywhere (~0.1)
greedy: infer a length-invariant order-2 (bigram) local rule with backoff
strong: infer the full order-3 (trigram) local law with stupid-backoff for unseen contexts, generalizing to longer OOD arrays
invalid: emit a wrong-shape / out-of-range answer -> 0
